text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days ago...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Spring is here—the Classics season.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping that it'd be a warm spring, but
there's still a chill in the air...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All I seem to have brought you is pain and
sadness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when burdened by the memory of her bad
health around the time of the Sumire Stakes,
Super Creek desperately continues working her
hardest.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I can keep going. Just a little bit more...
choice_data_list: Consider the state of your body.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Mnh... You're right... I'll end up causing you more
trouble if I push any harder.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so ashamed for causing you to make such a
fuss over me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, could I at least help you out in some other
way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to do some shopping, partly as a way
to lighten her mood.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I haven't had this much fun shopping in
ages! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if there's anywhere else you'd like to
stop by, okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you want to go get a parfait? My treat.
It's the least I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I think it's been a while since I've seen her
enjoy herself...

text_block_list.name: TV Host
text_block_list.text:
The wait is over, Umamusume fans! It's time for
this month's Race Flash!

text_block_list.name: TV Host
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a look at the Satsuki Sho's main
contenders as they train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several Umamusume are shown one after another
on the big TV screen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They can all be seen racing enthusiastically.

text_block_list.name: TV Host
text_block_list.text:
But it's a shame that Super Creek isn't featured
here.

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text:
It really is. Many fans had great expectations of
her, but at the moment, it seems unlikely that
she'll race.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
choice_data_list: Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I won't. There's nothing I can do about it. I
brought this on myself...

text_block_list.name: TV Host
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I hear that Super
Creek's trainer is a newcomer with no record to
speak of.

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perhaps it's that lack of experience that's
hindering Super Creek's amazing talent and
potential.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um... Do you mind if we go back to the academy?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to train some more. If it weren't for me,
then...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But it is my fault that they're saying those horrible things about you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And... all I wanted was to make you smile...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I need to work harder to make you happy...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I... U-urgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to my office and think about Super
Creek's condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The color suddenly drained from her face earlier
when she resolved to work harder for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't be sure, but...
choice_data_list: Maybe the reason for her bad health is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might have made an important realization. I'll
keep an eye on Super Creek for a little longer.
